reviewTexts: Great just be prepared to wait in line for an hour 🤣

Excellent place to visit for hot food or desserts! They have so many choices of desserts, and it can be a challenge to make a decision on what to order. Sometimes, what you want is too much for your stomach to handle, but it is always delicious! The service is fast, friendly, and efficient!
Best ice cream in the burgh, thick and creamy, always delicious and they never miss. Great vibes and great servers
End of the season October 24, 2019. See you in the spring. Chocolate chip cookie sunday. My favorite! They have a food truck now!
Always a classic! Great staff. Clean. Line will be long but moves quickly. Takes cash and cards. Get the Nancy B sundae!

I’m very serious about ice cream and Page’s lives up to the hype! I had coconut soft serve dipped in a cherry  shell and it was incredible. Texture and taste were perfect and you could really taste the homemade coconut.

Shout out to the friendly and professional staff!

I also had a Big Back Arctic Swirl with cookies and pretzels and while I enjoyed the first half, the pretzels made it too salty by the end.

Pro tips:

- it’s always crowded in the evening, but the line moves quickly and it’s a safe and friendly atmosphere.

-consider wearing bug repellent. It’s Pittsburgh.

-the soft serve will start melting immediately and the portions are big, even for a small cone.
That gave me WAY too much ice cream, the price was RIDICULOUSLY affordable, and the long line moved EXTREMELY quickly! 1/1 will come back soon
Best ice cream store in the region. Lines are often long, but well worth it.
